mapper.select: { call AUTHENTICATE_LOGIN( #{loginId, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accountLoginId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleDisplay, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publicUserId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
